title: The Irritator [HORROR] [DWELLER] [CRYPTID]
body:
HAS A DWELLER ID

HAS BEEN TESTED ON 1.19.2

The Irritator Is a Dweller, descendant from the Origin, and has saught to find humans in the surface, but shall only appear at night.



 CURRENT FEATURES

New Added sounds are Irritating footstep sounds, and hurt sounds, and new death sound, reskin is the Cave Dweller, And Origin Itself, Fixed Subtitles for the Dweller,

IMPORTANT: NEEDS GECKOLIB FOR ANIMATIONS TO WORK



AI

The Irrtator will give you hints that it is near by making aggrevating sounds when near you, and also emitting sounds like the natural cave dweller, and if you encounter it in the caves, you know exactly what is about to happen.



CREDITS

 Smoreh(Creator)  , KAY5157(dweller ID he made it simple) Swayle (he Told me to make it)



CURRENT FEATURES

Has its Own Model, Has A Gapping mouth, larger than the player, gives you Irritation, Stands on 4 Legs.

The Irritator SIze: 9.5 Blocks Tall
